injectionSite.description: Administer injections into subcutaneous fat (such as the stomach, thigh, or arm). Rotate injection sites to avoid irritation.

timeOfDay.night: Alternatively administer at night at least 1 hour after your last meal.

doseProtocol: Option 1: Once daily, 5 units (100 mcg / 100 mcg) at bedtime, 2 hours after your last meal.
Option 2: Twice daily, 5 units (100 mcg / 100 mcg) in the morning 1 hour before breakfast and 5 units (100 mcg / 100 mcg) at bedtime, 2 hours after your last meal.
Option 3: Once daily, 10 units (200 mcg / 200 mcg) at bedtime, 2 hours after your last meal.

penDetails.totalPeptide: Contains 6 mg / 6 mg of CJC-1295 / Ipamorelin
penDetails.duration: 8 weeks for Option 1, 4 weeks for Option 2 and 3 of Dose Protocol

recommendedCycles.duration: PT-141 does not require cycling. It is used on an as-needed basis, typically 30 - 60 minutes before intimacy or when desiring increased libido and connection.
